name: Personal Portfolio
description: Showcase of my projects and skills as a web developer.

name: Marvel Rivals Crosshair Showcase
description: Showcase of Marvel characters with crosshair effects.

name: FC26 Auction
description: Real-time football player auction platform built with Next.js App Router, NextAuth, MongoDB, and Socket.IO. Features manager registration, live auctions with real-time bidding, lineup management, achievements tracking, admin controls, and tournament fixtures with full role-based access control.

name: Demo-Cafe
description: ArenaX — a gaming & esports e-commerce platform built with Next.js 16 and TypeScript. Features product catalog, persistent cart, validated checkout (Zod), PDF receipts, and a modular feature structure.

name: FPL News Portal
description: Your ultimate hub for all things Fantasy Premier League! Features real-time FPL news updates, points calculator, player performance analysis, and fixture difficulty. Built with modern technologies and mobile-first responsive design with glassmorphism UI and custom dark/light mode transitions.

name: Bookshop Management System
description: Responsive e-commerce book shop with React frontend and Node.js backend. Features include book inventory management, user authentication, and RESTful API integration with MongoDB database.

name: Rainwater Convention Website
description: A 4-page event website (Home, FAQs, Registration, Admin) with participant registration form, client-side validation, and admin portal for managing registrations. Features localStorage persistence and SweetAlert2 modals.

name: Task Tracker App!
description: A full-stack task management application with user authentication, real-time updates, and a responsive design.

name: User List Application
description: Dynamic user information display with card view layout, integrated search functionality, and sorting capabilities. Built with modern React patterns and responsive design using Tailwind CSS and Daisy UI.
